notes: ChatGPT-linked Codex: plain `codex` on PATH (no `ollama launch`). Authenticate with `codex login` (ChatGPT OAuth) or subscription-backed credentials.
Model IDs must match strings your Codex CLI accepts on `codex exec -m` (override). Run `codex debug models --bundled` to inspect the bundled catalog.
Uses `codex exec --json --ephemeral` with the harness autonomy flags.

models.label: GPT-5.5 xhigh (Codex / ChatGPT)
models.selection_reason: Codex `gpt-5.5` with `model_reasoning_effort=xhigh` (extra-high reasoning). Verify with `codex debug models`. May require subscription tier; fallback to `gpt-5.4` if unsupported.

models.label: GPT-5.4 (Codex / ChatGPT)
models.selection_reason: Codex CLI docs example for `-m`. Edit `id` if your catalog uses a different tag.

models.label: GPT-5.3-Codex (Codex CLI)
models.selection_reason: Often listed as the Codex-tuned variant; confirm with `codex debug models`.
